aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Action-oriented aur restless vibe

💼 Career: Jaldi decision lene ka pressure aa sakta hai

❤️ Love: Tone soft rakho warna clash ho sakta hai

💰 Money: Expense control karna zaruri

🧘 Advice: Har situation pe react karna zaruri nahi

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Control har jagah possible nahi hota
